name: web-scraper-plus
description: 支持网页爬取、截图和iWiki内容沉淀的技能，能够爬取网页内容生成MD文档，同时提供页面截图功能并将内容上传到iWiki知识库
author: CodeBuddy

commands.name: scrape
commands.usage: node index.js <url> [格式: word|md] [文件名] [截图: true|false] [iwiki: true|false]
examples: node index.js https://example.com md report true true
node index.js https://csig.lexiangla.com/pages/49dbff8abd494c298e7a7d755ead2faf?company_from=csig word report true true
